welcome_description: This tool helps you configure API endpoints and models for AI coding assistants.
privacy_notice: Your API Key is stored locally (~/.coding-helper/config.yaml) and never uploaded to any server.
apikey_hint: To get an API Key, visit: https://portal.qiniu.com/ai-inference/api-key
model_select_haiku: Select Haiku model (fast/lightweight) (type to search or enter custom model ID):
model_select_sonnet: Select Sonnet model (balanced) (type to search or enter custom model ID):
model_select_opus: Select Opus model (powerful) (type to search or enter custom model ID):
model_sync_prompt: Sync configuration to Claude Code now?
model_skip_prompt: Do you need to configure models separately?
model_skip_hint: 💡Qiniu API supports Claude's default model IDs (Claude series), so custom model configuration is optional. Choose "No" to use Claude's default models.
model_select_subagent: Select Subagent model (sub-agents) (type to search or enter custom model ID):
clear_config_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all configuration? (API Key, endpoint, language and model settings will be removed.)
tool_update_skipped: Already up to date, no update needed
company_announcement: You are using Qiniu Cloud AI model inference service 🚀
codebuddy_select_models: Select models to configure (space to select, enter to confirm)
codebuddy_reuse_previous_selection: Previous model configuration detected, reuse it?
codebuddy_fetching_models: Fetching model list from Qiniu API...
codebuddy_models_not_configured: CodeBuddy models not configured. Please use "Configure models" to select models first.
codebuddy_models_unavailable: The following configured models are no longer available in the Qiniu model market (likely delisted) and will be skipped: {{models}}
codebuddy_all_models_unavailable: None of the configured models are available in the Qiniu model market (likely delisted): {{models}}. Please reconfigure the models and try again.
workbuddy_select_models: Select models to configure (space to select, enter to confirm)
workbuddy_reuse_previous_selection: Previous model configuration detected, reuse it?
workbuddy_fetching_models: Fetching model list from Qiniu API...
workbuddy_models_not_configured: WorkBuddy models not configured. Please use "Configure models" to select models first.
workbuddy_models_unavailable: The following configured models are no longer available in the Qiniu model market (likely delisted) and will be skipped: {{models}}
workbuddy_all_models_unavailable: None of the configured models are available in the Qiniu model market (likely delisted): {{models}}. Please reconfigure the models and try again.
codex_fixed_model_hint: Codex uses a fixed model "{{model}}" via Qiniu proxy. No selection needed.
tool_desktop_launch_hint: {{tool}} is a desktop application. Please launch it manually.
tool_desktop_update_hint: {{tool}} is a desktop application. Please visit the official website to download the latest version.
